title: get down with the negative
description: Exploring self-acceptance and struggle with negativity.
lyrics:
Feelin' good, get down with the negative Feelin' good, get down, down with the negative
Can you understand, ain't your own mind feelin' it  just the pouring in of your self
Yeah, get down with the negative Get down with the down, down, down with the
Yeah, get down with the negative Get down with the down, down, down with you
Get down with the negative Get down with the down, down, down with you
I know you're waiting for the one of you I know you're waiting for the day to come
I know there's a cliff in your mind You run from every time that you wanna say
So lay your head and say, get down with the negative Get down, get down, get down on you
Get down with the negative, get down Get down, down, down with the pessimal
Get down, down with the negative I'm down for you, you're down for me
Get down with the negative Get down with the negative
Lost all hype now, just goin' around Singin' hello to the heavy with a frown
Gonna find myself out, matter of fact I know it's comin' to it
Just a disaster and hear me out, they ain't hearin' me or just usin' me
Which one is me or am I just happy and cryin' and happy?
I just want you to know that it's not a year
I just want you to know that it's all about you
You're possessin' a new groove, ain't I?
You get down, uh, uh, yeah Get down with another fuckin' round
So get down with the negative, come on Get down, get down on you
Get down with the negative Get down with the negative
Down, down, down, yeah Get down with the negative
Get the negative feeling on you Can't you see that it's just a disaster
All inside of us, that's the way we get high
Get down with the negative Get down with everything inside
Yeah, get down with the negative Get down, get, get down
I can clip, I can thing, I'm pretty cool When you call you everything
I said, yeah, get down with the negative Get down with the, get down with you
Get down with the negative Get down with the downside
Get down, down on you Get down with the negative
Get down with the negative, down on you
Get down, come on, come on, world Get down with the negative
Get down with the negative
It's just a subjective view on the energy
Get down with the negative
It's just a subjective, subjective, subjective, subjective view
Get down, get down if you want, you know, it's fine, it's cool
...
...
...


...
